title: Fundamental Digital Security Methods Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core concepts of encryption and hashing, two simple digital methods for ensuring data security and privacy.
relationships: Plaintext is encrypted into Ciphertext for secure transmission/storage, then decrypted back to Plaintext by an authorized recipient
Plaintext is run through a Hashing Algorithm to create a unique, fixed-size Digital Fingerprint used to verify data integrity
